heroInsight: Carousels featuring brand collaborations are crushing it with engagement scores up to 1831, as seen with @annettevasquezzz's Darc Sport x Von Dutch drop.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are dominating with 63% of total posts, achieving an average engagement of 54 likes, outpacing static posts by over 2x.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels remain a core discovery format — algorithm favors sub-60s with strong 3-second hooks

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are leading due to high engagement in brand collaboration posts

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories drive DM shares and close-audience engagement — use for behind-the-scenes and polls

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are lagging with lower average likes and comments

hotTopics.detail: Controversial debates about Ozempic's role in bodybuilding are heating up.

critical: DM shares are the top signal, 3-5x more valuable than likes
First 3 seconds retention is crucial for Reels reach
proTips: Mix 3-4 Reels/week with 2-3 carousels and 1-2 static posts for optimal engagement
Focus on originality; 10+ reposts in 30 days can lead to shadowbans
